since_last: 43% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.72%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.53% · Gold -2.31% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 43% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.72%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.72%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.15%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -14.04%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +10.78%, CBRS +6.14%, AVAV +5.85%, HON +5.38%, KLAC +4.75%. Laggards: TSLA -14.04%, CRNC -7.85%, GOOGL -6.99%, DV -4.68%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.68% at $118.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
